ast.name: title
ast.source: Processes the current file to add [[wiki-links]] and create concept notes.
ast.target: 处理当前文件以添加 [[wiki-links]] 并创建概念笔记。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Processes all files in a selected folder to add [[wiki-links]] and create concept notes.
ast.target: 处理所选文件夹中的所有文件以添加 [[wiki-links]] 并创建概念笔记。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Uses the current note title or selection for web search and appends an LLM summary.
ast.target: 使用当前笔记标题或所选内容进行网络搜索，并追加 LLM 摘要。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Generates content for the current note based on its title, replacing existing content.
ast.target: 根据当前笔记标题生成内容，替换现有内容。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Generates content for all notes in a selected folder based on their titles.
ast.target: 根据所选文件夹中所有笔记的标题生成内容。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Translates the selected text using the configured provider.
ast.target: 使用配置的提供商翻译所选文本。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Translates all files in a selected folder.
ast.target: 翻译所选文件夹中的所有文件。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Summarises the current note content as a Mermaid mindmap diagram and saves it to a new file.
ast.target: 将当前笔记内容总结为 Mermaid 思维导图并保存到新文件。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Extracts concepts from the current file and creates concept notes without modifying the original file.
ast.target: 从当前文件中提取概念并创建概念笔记，不修改原文件。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Extracts concepts from all files in a selected folder and creates concept notes without modifying the original files.
ast.target: 从所选文件夹中的所有文件提取概念并创建概念笔记，不修改原文件。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Extracts verbatim text from the current file based on questions defined in settings.
ast.target: 根据设置中定义的问题从当前文件提取原文。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Fixes Mermaid and LaTeX syntax in all Markdown files in a selected folder.
ast.target: 修复所选文件夹中所有 Markdown 文件的 Mermaid 和 LaTeX 语法。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Converts single $ lines to $$ blocks in the current file.
ast.target: 将当前文件中的单个 $ 行转换为 $$ 块。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Converts single $ lines to $$ blocks for all files in a folder.
ast.target: 将文件夹中所有文件的单个 $ 行转换为 $$ 块。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Checks Concept Note folder for duplicates and prompts for deletion.
ast.target: 检查概念笔记文件夹中的重复项并提示删除。

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Concept folder only (compares concept notes against each other)
ast.target: 仅概念文件夹（将概念笔记相互比较）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Exclude specific folders (compares concept notes to notes outside specified folders)
ast.target: 排除指定文件夹（将概念笔记与指定文件夹外的笔记比较）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Include specific folders only (compares concept notes to notes in specified folders)
ast.target: 仅包含指定文件夹（将概念笔记与指定文件夹内的笔记比较）

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Entire vault (default - compares concept notes to all other notes)
ast.target: 整个库（默认 - 将概念笔记与所有其他笔记比较）

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析 gitGraph 选项时出错

ast.name: log
ast.source: If randomize option is set to false, then quality option must be 'default' or 'proof'.
ast.target: 如果 randomize 选项设为 false，则 quality 选项必须为 'default' 或 'proof'。

ast.name: log
ast.source: [DeepSeek] Response has reasoning_content but no content field
ast.target: [DeepSeek] 响应包含 reasoning_content 但没有 content 字段

ast.name: log
ast.target: [OpenRouter] 成功解析 JSON 响应。

ast.source: [OpenRouter] Warning: JSON parsing failed despite 200 OK. Using raw response text as potential content.
ast.target: [OpenRouter] 警告：尽管返回 200 OK，JSON 解析失败。使用原始响应文本作为潜在内容。

ast.source: Warning: Could not parse any valid results from DuckDuckGo HTML.
ast.target: 警告：无法从 DuckDuckGo HTML 解析出任何有效结果。

ast.source: Finished fetching content for DuckDuckGo results.
ast.target: 已完成获取 DuckDuckGo 结果的内容。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Using snippets directly from Tavily results.
ast.target: 直接使用 Tavily 结果中的片段。

ast.source: No content could be obtained from search results.
ast.target: 无法从搜索结果获取任何内容。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Error: No active file found in researchAndSummarize.
ast.target: 错误：在 researchAndSummarize 中未找到活动文件。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Error: Could not get provider for 'research' task.
ast.target: 错误：无法获取 'research' 任务的提供方。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已对摘要应用 Mermaid/LaTeX 清理。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Duplicate detection is disabled in settings.
ast.target: 设置中已禁用重复检测。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Potential duplicate/consistency issues found in content:
ast.target: 在内容中发现潜在的重复/一致性问题：

ast.name: log
ast.source: No concepts found in LLM output to create notes for.
ast.target: LLM 输出中未发现可创建笔记的概念。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Processing mode: Move & Overwrite original file.
ast.target: 处理模式：移动并覆盖原始文件。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 处理模式：覆盖原始文件（自定义设置）。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Processing mode: Create copy with custom suffix.
ast.target: 处理模式：使用自定义后缀创建副本。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Processing mode: Create/Overwrite default processed copy.
ast.target: 处理模式：创建/覆盖默认处理副本。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已请求取消，停止批量处理。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 已请求取消，停止批量修复。

ast.source: Failed to save error log file. Check console.
ast.target: 无法保存错误日志文件。请检查控制台。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Duplicate check mode: Comparing concept notes against 'Entire Vault' (excluding concept folder).
ast.target: 重复检查模式：将概念笔记与“Entire Vault”（不含概念文件夹）进行比较。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Duplicate check mode: Comparing concept notes against other notes within the 'Concept Folder Only'.
ast.target: 重复检查模式：将概念笔记与“Concept Folder Only”中的其他笔记进行比较。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Skipping single-word containment check (mode: 'Concept Folder Only').
ast.target: 跳过单词包含检查（模式：“Concept Folder Only”）。

ast.target: 未发现潜在的重复概念笔记。

ast.source: Debug: "Research & Summarize" clicked, but no active Markdown file found.
ast.target: 调试：已点击“Research & Summarize”，但未找到活动的 Markdown 文件。

ast.source: Translate button clicked but already processing. Ignoring.
ast.target: 已点击翻译按钮，但正在处理中。忽略。

ast.target: 没有可翻译的活动文件。翻译命令未启动。

ast.target: 正在运行 Mermaid 语法自动修复…

ast.target: ⚠️ 无法将错误详情写入日志文件。

ast.source: Running automatic Mermaid syntax fix on completed folder...
ast.target: 正在对已完成文件夹运行 Mermaid 语法自动修复…

ast.name: log
ast.source: Could not determine completed folder path for Mermaid fix.
ast.target: 无法确定用于 Mermaid 修复的已完成文件夹路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Export your current provider settings to a JSON file, or import settings from a file.
ast.target: 将当前提供商设置导出为 JSON 文件，或从文件导入设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the LLM provider to use for processing.
ast.target: 选择用于处理的 LLM 提供商。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 控制随机性（0=确定性，1=创造性）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required API version for Azure OpenAI (e.g., 2024-02-15-preview)
ast.target: Azure OpenAI 所需的 API 版本（例如 2024-02-15-preview）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Verify API key, endpoint, and model accessibility.
ast.target: 验证 API 密钥、端点和模型可访问性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Select a specific LLM provider for each task below. Off: Use the single "Active Provider".
ast.target: 开：为下方每个任务选择特定的 LLM 提供商。关：使用单一“活动提供商”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Save translated files to a specified path. Off: Save in the same folder as the original file.
ast.target: 开：将翻译文件保存到指定路径。关：保存在原文件所在文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where translated files will be saved (relative to vault root).
ast.target: 翻译文件保存的文件夹（相对库根目录）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to use a custom suffix instead of the default "_translated".
ast.target: 启用后使用自定义后缀替代默认的“_translated”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The custom suffix to append to translated filenames.
ast.target: 追加到翻译文件名的自定义后缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Save Mermaid summary files to a specified path. Off: Save in the same folder as the original file.
ast.target: 开：将 Mermaid 摘要文件保存到指定路径。关：保存在原文件所在文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where Mermaid summary files will be saved (relative to vault root).
ast.target: Mermaid 摘要文件保存的文件夹（相对库根目录）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to use a custom suffix instead of the default "_summ".
ast.target: 启用后使用自定义后缀替代默认的“_summ”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The custom suffix to append to Mermaid summary filenames.
ast.target: 追加到 Mermaid 摘要文件名的自定义后缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If selected, the summary output will be translated into the user's selected translation language; if not selected, the default will be the original text language.
ast.target: 勾选后，摘要输出将翻译为用户选择的翻译语言；未勾选则默认使用原文语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Newly created concept notes will only contain the title. Off: They may include other content like backlinks.
ast.target: 开：新建概念笔记仅包含标题。关：可能包含反向链接等其他内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Add a backlink to the source document in the concept note. Off: Do not add backlinks during extraction.
ast.target: 开：在概念笔记中添加指向源文档的反向链接。关：提取时不添加反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Automatically retry failed LLM API calls. Off: Fail on first error.
ast.target: 开：自动重试失败的 LLM API 调用。关：首次错误即失败。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Enable detailed error logging (DeepSeek-style) for all providers to help diagnose API issues. Off: Use standard concise error reporting.
ast.target: 开：为所有提供商启用详细错误日志（DeepSeek 风格），帮助诊断 API 问题。关：使用标准简洁错误报告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Save to specified path. Off: Save in original folder.
ast.target: 开：保存到指定路径。关：保存在原文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Move original to processed folder. Off: Create copy named "_processed.md".
ast.target: 开：将原文件移动到已处理文件夹。关：创建名为“_processed.md”的副本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Create new concept notes in specified path. Off: Do not create automatically.
ast.target: 开：在指定路径创建新的概念笔记。关：不自动创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Log newly created concept notes.
ast.target: 开：记录新创建的概念笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Relative path. Required if custom path enabled.
ast.target: 相对路径。启用自定义路径时必填。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name for the log file. Required if custom name enabled.
ast.target: 日志文件名称。启用自定义名称时必填。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Perform web research before generating.
ast.target: 开：生成前执行网页研究。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Automatically run a syntax fix pass on notes after using 'Generate from Title' or 'Create & Generate from Selection'.
ast.target: 开：使用“从标题生成”或“从选区创建并生成”后自动对笔记进行语法修复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the list of questions to extract specific text for, separated by newlines.
ast.target: 输入要提取特定文本的问题列表，以换行分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Move completed files to custom folder. Off: Move to '[original_foldername]_complete'.
ast.target: 开：将已完成文件移至自定义文件夹。关：移至“[original_foldername]_complete”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 已完成文件的子文件夹名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for Tavily. Get from tavily.com.
ast.target: Tavily 必需。请从 tavily.com 获取。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max wait time per result URL.
ast.target: 每个结果 URL 的最大等待时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Approx. max tokens from web results for summarization prompt.
ast.target: 用于总结提示词的网页结果最大 token 约数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max words per chunk sent to LLM.
ast.target: 发送给 LLM 的每个分块最大字数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max tokens LLM should generate per response.
ast.target: LLM 每次响应应生成的最大 token 数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow parallel LLM calls for faster batch processing.
ast.target: 允许并行调用 LLM 以加快批处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max parallel LLM calls (1=serial). Respect API limits!
ast.target: 最大并行 LLM 调用数（1=串行）。请遵守 API 限制！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable checks for duplicate terms (results in console).
ast.target: 启用重复术语检查（结果在控制台）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the desired output language for LLM responses.
ast.target: 选择 LLM 响应的目标输出语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Select a specific language for each task below. Off: Use the single "Output language".
ast.target: 开：为下方每个任务选择特定语言。关：使用单一的“输出语言”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Non-Translate tasks do not force a target language or auto-translate outputs. The explicit "Translate" task still performs translation as configured.
ast.target: 开：非翻译任务不强制目标语言，也不自动翻译输出。明确的“翻译”任务仍按配置进行翻译。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If selected, the output will include a translation in the selected extraction language.
ast.target: 选中后，输出将包含所选提取语言的翻译。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Submit all questions in a single LLM prompt (faster/cheaper). Off: Process each question individually (higher precision).
ast.target: 开：将所有问题合并为一次 LLM 提示（更快/更省）。关：逐个处理问题（精度更高）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Use custom folder and suffix for extracted files. Off: Save in original folder with default "_Extracted" suffix.
ast.target: 开：为提取文件使用自定义文件夹和后缀。关：保存在原始文件夹并使用默认“_Extracted”后缀。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where extracted files will be saved (relative to vault root).
ast.target: 提取的文件将保存到的文件夹（相对于库根目录）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The custom suffix to append to the filename (e.g., "_MyExtract").
ast.target: 要追加到文件名的自定义后缀（例如 "_MyExtract"）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Scan files for Mermaid syntax errors after fixing and generate a report. Off: Skip error detection.
ast.target: 开：修复后扫描文件中的 Mermaid 语法错误并生成报告。关：跳过错误检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Move any files that still contain Mermaid errors after fixing to a designated folder.
ast.target: 开：将修复后仍包含 Mermaid 错误的文件移动到指定文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to move files with errors to.
ast.target: 用于移动有错误文件的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define the scope for finding duplicate counterparts.
ast.target: 定义查找重复对应项的范围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Use your custom prompt below for this task. Off: Use the default prompt.
ast.target: 开：对此任务使用下面的自定义提示词。关：使用默认提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter your custom prompt. Placeholders like {TITLE} or {RESEARCH_CONTEXT_SECTION} will be replaced if applicable for the task. Refer to the default prompt for available placeholders.
ast.target: 输入你的自定义提示词。若适用于该任务，{TITLE} 或 {RESEARCH_CONTEXT_SECTION} 等占位符将被替换。可参考默认提示词查看可用占位符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: On: Add a specific learning domain to your prompts to improve contextual understanding. Off: Use the default general prompt.
ast.target: 开：在提示词中加入特定学习领域以提升上下文理解。关：使用默认通用提示词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify one or more fields, e.g., 'Materials Science', 'Polymer Physics', 'Machine Learning'. This will be added to the beginning of your prompts.
ast.target: 指定一个或多个领域，例如“材料科学”“高分子物理”“机器学习”。这将添加到你的提示词开头。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 为不同任务使用不同提供商

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义翻译文件保存路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use custom suffix for translated files
ast.target: 为翻译文件使用自定义后缀

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 任务：总结为 Mermaid 图表

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义 Mermaid 摘要保存路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use custom suffix for Mermaid summary files
ast.target: 为 Mermaid 摘要文件使用自定义后缀

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Translate to corresponding language when summarising
ast.target: 摘要时翻译为对应语言

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用稳定的 API 调用（重试逻辑）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义处理后文件保存路径

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use custom output filename for 'Add links'
ast.target: 为“Add links”使用自定义输出文件名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义日志文件保存路径

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在“从标题生成”中启用研究

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-run Mermaid syntax fix after generation
ast.target: 生成后自动运行 Mermaid 语法修复

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use custom output folder for 'Generate from title'
ast.target: 为“从标题生成”使用自定义输出文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自定义输出文件夹名称

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 研究内容最大 token 数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Select different languages for different tasks.
ast.target: 为不同任务选择不同语言。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 禁用自动翻译（“Translate”任务除外）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将输出翻译为对应语言

ast.name: setName

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: KaTeX doesn't work in quirks mode. Make sure your website has a suitable doctype.
ast.target: 警告：KaTeX 在怪异模式下无法工作。请确保你的网站使用合适的 doctype。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cluster without external connections, without a parent and with children
ast.target: 没有外部连接、没有父节点且有子节点的集群

ast.name: warn
ast.source: flowchart-elk was moved to an external package in Mermaid v11. Please refer [release notes](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0) for more details. This diagram will be rendered using `dagre` layout as a fallback.
ast.target: 在 Mermaid v11 中，flowchart-elk 已移动到外部包。请参阅[发布说明](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0)了解更多详情。该图将使用 `dagre` 布局作为回退渲染。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The difference between the min and max time is more than 5 years. This will cause performance issues. Skipping drawing exclude days.
ast.target: 最小和最大时间的差值超过 5 年。这将导致性能问题。跳过绘制排除的天数。

ast.target: 导入时跳过无效的 provider 对象：

ast.name: content
ast.target: 你是一个有帮助的助手。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown-ish syntax for generating flowcharts, mindmaps, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, gantt charts, git graphs and more.
ast.target: 用于生成流程图、思维导图、时序图、类图、甘特图、Git 图等的类 Markdown 语法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，使公式采用显示样式（例如 \int 和 \sum 会更大），并在页面上单独成行居中显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式渲染显示公式（标签左对齐）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \color 模式切换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的特性将报错。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 特性，例如 \url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定数量，以防止例如无限宏循环。若设为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fork or join in process flow

ast.name: description
ast.source: This Object indicates the Parser is during Recording Phase
ast.target: 此对象表示解析器处于记录阶段

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	此词法分析器已定义为跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何 Token 类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	详见 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	了解详情。
